name: gnomcp
description: Gno smart-contract skills + MCP server: interrealm semantics, security audit, idiomatic patterns, Render() authoring, on-chain payments, project setup.

interface.shortDescription: Write, audit, and ship Gno smart contracts with on-chain tools
interface.longDescription: Use gnomcp to author, test, audit, and reason about Gno realms — the smart-contract language for gno.land. Bundles the gno skill (interrealm spec, security taxonomy, idiomatic patterns, Render() conventions, build/test setup) with an MCP server that exposes on-chain tools (gno_read, gno_inspect, gno_render, gno_eval, gno_call, gno_run, gno_session_propose).
defaultPrompt: Help me write a Gno realm for X.
Audit this Gno contract before I send funds to it.
Explain how cross(cur) works in interrealm v2.
